trigger.Name: Create_zaval
trigger.script:
CreateNewDummyObject( "crag_boulder2", "Kamen1", -1, -1, CVector(3325.707, 471.617, 877.365), Quaternion(0.0000, -0.1262, 0.0000, 0.9920),1 ) CreateNewDummyObject( "crag_boulder1", "Kamen2", -1, -1, CVector(3322.961, 470.900, 848.140), Quaternion(0.0000, -0.5318, 0.0000, 0.8469),1 ) CreateNewDummyObject( "crag_boulder3", "Kamen3", -1, -1, CVector(3342.943, 472.500, 830.940), Quaternion(0.0000, -0.7417, 0.0000, 0.6708),1 ) CreateNewDummyObject( "crag_boulder4", "Kamen4", -1, -1, CVector(3362.232, 470.900, 873.310), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.4791, 0.0000, 0.8778),1 ) CreateNewDummyObject( "r2_crag_copped_3", "Kamen5", -1, -1, CVector(3417.339, 470.000, 838.794), Quaternion(0.0000, -0.2058, 0.0000, 0.9786),1 )
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_HOUSE_MED_FIRE", "Fire1", -1, -1, CVector(2419.187, 360.000, 667.352), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 0.112)
CreateVehicleEx("CoolBelaz_3","Kochewnik1", CVector(2449.297, 359.772, 678.478), 1064) trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: BOLOTO
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Boloto_Return" )
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:UnlimitMaxSpeed() end

trigger.Name: BOLOTO_RETURN
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Boloto" )
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:LimitMaxSpeed(20) end

trigger.Name: BOLOTO_QUEST
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Boloto_quest_Return" )
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:UnlimitMaxSpeed() end
PlayCustomMusic("block0_driving")

trigger.Name: BOLOTO_QUEST_RETURN
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Boloto_quest" )
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:LimitMaxSpeed(20) end
PlayCustomMusic("6_proc")

trigger.Name: triggerExitToMap13
trigger.script:
local Plf = GetPlayerVehicle() Plf:SetThrottle( 0 ) Plf:SetCustomLinearVelocity( 0 )
local PlfID = GetPlayerVehicleId() local PlfCoor = Plf:GetPosition() PlfCoor.y = PlfCoor.y + 25*0.74 PlfCoor.z = PlfCoor.z + 25*0.74
local b = SpawnMessageBox( "8802" ) if b == 1 then PassToMap("r2m2", "FromR1M4", -1 ) else SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
FlyAround(1, 0, 25, 1, PlfCoor, PlfID, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
TActivate ("RolikENDExitToMap13") end
